creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
On Sat, 2007-10-20 at 23:27 +0900, Norikatsu Shigemura wrote:
>         I have same patch depressed by another step:-).  It's support
>         FreeBSD9 and 10.x~19.x, too, maybe:-).

Well, IIRC ports are no longer required to support even 4.x, so we could
just make it -freebsd* and drop 2.x support.

robert.
